items.name: FinanceToolkit
items.description: Transparent and Efficient Financial Analysis

items.name: edgartools
items.description: Python library to access and analyze SEC Edgar filings, XBRL financial statements, 10-K, 10-Q, and 8-K reports

items.name: defeatbeta-api
items.description: An open-source alternative to Yahoo Finance's market data APIs with higher reliability.

items.name: FundamentalsQuantifier
items.description: A tool that allows you to visually compare the fundamentals of over 6,000 companies.

items.name: sec-api-python
items.description: Python SDK for SEC & EDGAR data — API access and bulk dataset downloads for 20M+ filings, insider trades, 13F holdings, financial statements, exec comp, enforcement actions, material contracts, registration statements & prospectuses, bond & credit agreements, investment advisers, proxy voting, XBRL-to-JSON, real-time streaming, full-text search...

items.name: yahoo-finance-mcp
items.description: This is a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that provides comprehensive financial data from Yahoo Finance. It allows you to retrieve detailed information about stocks, including historical prices, company information, financial statements, options data, and market news.

items.name: financial-statement-pdf-extractor
items.description: Python script to extract as much structured information as possible from annual/quarterly reports.

items.name: federal-treasury-api
items.description: The scraper, parser, and database creation scripts for Financial Management Service daily U.S. Treasury statements.

items.name: 10K-MDA-Section
items.description: Extract the Management Discussion and Analyses (MD&A) section from 10K Financial Statements

items.name: fibooks
items.description: Python library for financial statement analysis.

items.name: FinStockDash
items.description: 📈 A  streamlit web app for retrieving and analyzing financial data for a stock ticker.

items.name: AutoAccounting
items.description: turning commands entered into gpt-3 into financial statements

items.name: dartlab
items.description: One stock code → full company story. Korean DART + US SEC EDGAR filings as structured Python data. 2,700+ KR / 970+ US companies.

items.name: sec-utils
items.description: Securities and Exchange Commission utility package for dealing with Edgar database. Includes methods to download index files and SEC files in a systematic way.

items.name: SECDataTools
items.description: Simple Python utility that downloads and extracts SEC financial statement data sets.

items.name: Finco.
items.description: Finco automates the process of generating financial documentation and valuations for companies traded on the NASDAQ and NYSE. Provides user with a live stock price index, current balance sheet, liquidity ratios, current income statement, and a projected discounted cash flow statement.

items.name: tikr-statements-scraper
items.description: TIKR Financial Statements Scraper

items.name: Financial_Statements-Python
items.description: Financial Statement Project (Balance Sheet, Cash Flow Statement, Income Statement)

items.name: Stock-Analyzer
items.description: Application that calculates the key values from financial statements of publicly traded companies

items.name: pavit-bank-reconciliation
items.description: Automate the process of a CSV file from bank to the financial structural ontology. The process of matching the balances in an entity's accounting records for a cash account to the corresponding information on a bank statement. The goal of this process is to ascertain the differences between the two, and to book changes to the accounting records as appropriate.
